positive: A vibrant, stylized silhouette of a celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by a cosmic nebula of sapphire blue, emerald green, and gold dust. The owl has large, intense, glowing eyes and is rendered with clean, sharp linework against a deep indigo night sky background. The composition is centered, emphasizing symmetry and strong contrast between the illuminated subjects and the dark background. Art Deco aesthetic meets vaporwave cosmic fantasy. Flat graphic design style, isolated on a solid background for apparel printing, vector quality, high contrast, glowing elements, detailed nebula pattern, highly conceptual, smooth gradients, perfect symmetry, minimal texture, centered composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, muddy colors, realism, photorealism, grainy, messy background, logos, trademarks, characters, copyrighted
